column1: The climate is mild in that part of the country. Unusual fruits and nuts____________everywhere. (FIND)
Diamonds usually look like pieces of glass when they_____________out of the ground. (TAKE)
The chalk that___________in classroom____________from the cliffs or the ground. It_______________in factories by mixing several different materials together. (USE/DIG/MAKE)
The country's farmlands produce maize, wheat, soybeans, and other crops that______________to counties all over the world. (SELL)
The storm was terrible. A lot og houses____________ . (DESTROY)
Many Africans______________to the island long ago to work as slaves on sugar plantations. (TAKE)
He put out the candle and they__________in total darkness. (LEAVE)
You can use the shelf. All the books___________in the bookcase now. (KEEP)
